description: Create a GitLab CI configuration that defines hidden job templates for CI tokens. Add a .tokens-for-all-branches template that extends the .id-tokens and .grafana-api-token templates. Then define a .common-ci-tokens template that extends .tokens-for-all-branches, making the ID and Grafana API tokens available to all branches. No stages, scripts, or artifacts are defined; these templates are only used for inheritance.
